name: NAVEENKUMAR T
title: Full-Stack Developer
subtitle: Full-Stack Developer crafting scalable modern web experiences with cutting-edge technologies
bio: I'm a passionate Full-stack developer and currently pursuing B.E. in Computer and Communication Engineering at Sri Sairam Institute of Technology, who loves turning ideas into meaningful digital products. My interest in technology grew from exploring how things work to actively building web applications, AI agents, and smart automations. I enjoy learning, experimenting with modern tools, and helping others grow as they step into the world of development.
